description: A student has broken their arm and needs temporary accommodations, such as a note-taker, for the next six weeks.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and explain the process for temporary accommodations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains the need for medical documentation.

nodes.task_description: Receive the doctor's note and create a temporary accommodation plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a plan for a volunteer note-taker for the student's classes for six weeks.

nodes.task_description: Notify the student's professors of the temporary accommodations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends official notification letters to the relevant faculty.
